'''Lagra''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who lived during the [[Old Republic era]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
If [[Meetra Surik]] convinces [[Nadaa]] to sell herself into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] with her daughter [[Adana (Human)|Adana]], Lagra is mentioned as having purchased the two refugees from [[Saquesh]].<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'': Conversation with [[Hussef]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]</ref>
